items.raw_desc: Playmobil Playmobil 72070 Kalandpark a vadonban:Playmobil 72070 Climbing Park in the Wilderness from the Animals and Friends series takes children to an African-themed climbing park, which is being discovered by a father and daughter. They are accompanied by a nurse. At the first stop, visitors get everything they need: a tape measure and a magnifying glass. From the suspension bridge they can admire the giraffe and zebra and even feed them through the hanging basket. The tree platform offers a swing, a hanging rope and a meeting with a lemur. The meerkat cave invites you to admire these cute creatures. Thanks to the cable car, dad and daughter move to the third stop where they can watch the lions through the glass floor or even feed them. The panels and collector cards, which can be read with a magnifying glass, offer a lot of interesting information. In addition, the animals literally come to life on the cards. Gumimatrac Bestway sziget:
	

	
	
	
	Nafukovací ostrov Bestway 279 × 269 cm je určen pro relaxaci až pěti osob na vodní hladině. items.raw_desc: Tricikli MoMi Telde rózsaszín:A kisgyermeked már nagyon vágyik az első közlekedési eszközére? Klasszikus megoldás lehet a kortalan tricikli. A kényelmes MoMi gyerek tricikli mindig vidámságot csempész a gyerekek napjába. Az alábbi anyagból készítették el a váz szerkezetét: fém. Allows simultaneous suction from both breasts at the same time. The three-phase pumping system mimics the natural rhythm of the baby's sucking - first stimulation (5 levels), then comes deep suction (9 levels) and finally a combination of both to promote lactation even with less milk production (5 levels). Touch controls make it easy to set everything up in a clear panel. The closed system prevents the backflow of milk into the tubing, preventing contamination and the passage of dirt and bacteria.
